feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2112 201 1911 98
TR 1955 172 1783 82

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Machinarium
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺149,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Machinarium is the award-winning independent adventure game developed by the makers of Samorost series, Botanicula and CHUCHEL. Help Josef the robot to save his girlfriend Berta kidnapped by the Black Cap Brotherhood gang. "Absolutely Fantastic" - TouchArcade 4/4 - USA TODAY 4/4 - SlideToPlay 9/10 - Pocket Gamer Awards: - IGF, Excellence in Visual Art Award - Gamasutra, Best Indie Game Of The Year - VGChartz.com, Best Indie Game Of The Year

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: The Tiny Bang Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

Life on Tiny Planet was calm and carefree until a great disaster occurred - Tiny Planet was hit by a meteor! The world fell apart and now its future depends only on you! Use your imagination and creativity: in order to restore Tiny Planet and help its inhabitants you will have to fix a variety of machines and mechanisms as well as solve puzzles in each of the five chapters of this game. Navigation is simple and intuitive. It doesn't distract you from the witty brain teasers, and you will be able to fully immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere of the game. *There is no text in this game. It is fun for all ages and suitable for the whole family! *Five vastly different chapters and over 30 exciting brain teasers (minigames) *A bright, gorgeous world drawn entirely by hand *Absorbing game play and simple navigation *10 enchanting musical themes - #1 Top Paid Apps for iOS in UK, Japan, German, Russia - Top 10 Best Games and Top 5 Best Adventure Games of 2011 by Gamezebo - Best Games of 2011 by GameHouse - Top 100 Best Indie Games of 2011 by Indie DB. - Top 10 on Mac App Store in more countries, TOP 1 - in Japan, Russia, Taiwan, China.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Digline: Cozy Mining
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → ₺99,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Digline is a relaxed and easy to learn drilling game where every descent is a gamble between progress and risk, and the real reward lies deeper underground. Start each run in your workshop, pick your setup, and head down with limited fuel and a scrappy rig. Carve your path through shifting layers of earth, decide what to collect, and choose what to upgrade and what to trade before everything runs out. Each dive reveals new materials, rarer finds, and unexpected patterns beneath the surface. What begins as simple digging gradually turns into a careful balance between exploration, efficiency, and timing. Back at the surface, refine your strategy and improve your runs: • Upgrade your drill, fuel capacity, and efficiency • Unlock new materials with higher value and deeper placement • Optimize routes to maximize each descent Progress builds steadily, but every run carries tension. Go too safe and you leave value behind. Push too far and risk losing it all. Shape your own rhythm underground: short and efficient runs, deep high-risk dives, or a steady climb toward mastering what lies below. Top 10 casual game in the US and UK, Top 5 in Germany, Norway, and others. Come join the fun! What starts as a simple search for resources gradually becomes something stranger. Your old tunnels remain, your map expands over time, and the underground begins to feel less random and more like a place with its own history. Digline is designed to be easy to pick up, fun in short sessions, and rewarding over the long term. Quick digs, short descents, tons of relaxing fun. Features: • intuitive one-finger portrait controls • short runs that fit easily into a minute or two • persistent tunnels and a map that grows with each expedition • multiple underground regions with different materials, hazards, and surprises • resources to gather and use for crafting upgrades, and better preparation • a workshop that turns each successful run into permanent progress • a market system for trading what you bring back • progression that builds across many sessions, not just a single run • a calm, cozy atmosphere with a sense of discovery underneath it • no ads, and no pay-to-win systems • by popular request, you can now purchase fuel if you want to keep on digging, but the game can be completed without any purchase • achievements and Daily Dig leaderboard competition The deeper you go, the more the mine will reveal.

entry.title: IIWII
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺149,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone. IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time. TIMELESS FILM LOOKS • Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks • Real-time preview — what you see is what you get • Adjustable intensity for your perfect look • Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks • Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more • Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel FULL MANUAL CONTROL • White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus • Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual • Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide THOUGHTFUL FEATURES • RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo • Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur • Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film • Self-Timer with 2, 5 or 10 second countdown • Record video with real-time film looks applied • Grid overlays and horizon level for composition • Built-in gallery with sharing and favorites • QR Code detection DESIGNED FOR SIMPLICITY • Clean, distraction-free interface • Ambient light effect reacts to your camera feed (iOS 26) • Quick preset switching with swipe gestures • Double-tap to flip camera • Edge exposure slider for precise control • Customizable top bar — choose your controls • Lock Screen camera with shared settings and looks PRIVACY FIRST • GPS tagging is optional and controllable • Location data automatically removed when sharing (configurable) • No analytics, no tracking, no ads — ever IIWII respects your moments. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. Your photos stay on your device. Capture what matters. It is what it is.

entry.title: Rush Rally Origins
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

In-App Purchases

  • Content Pack 1：₺149,99
  • Rallycross Circuits：₺149,99

Application Description

REALISTIC TOP DOWN RALLYING! Rush Rally Origins combines the classic top down racing action from the original Rush Rally with the highly praised graphics and physics from Rush Rally 3. Take on 36 new and unique stages across the world, each with the ability to change the time of day and weather. Drive over many challenging surface types including snow, gravel, dirt, mud and tarmac! EXPERIENCE THE RUSH Race at 60fps (120fps on supported devices) with one of the best car dynamics models to date, highly tuned for Rush Rally Origins to give a more fun top down racing experience. Feel the grip change across different surface types and multiple weather conditions. WORLD RALLY RACING Compete in a series of rally championships, race against others in our unique A-B Race mode or hold your nerve and focus on improving your times in the time trial game modes. REACH THE TOP Smash stage records to rise-up the global online leaderboards. Download ghosts across 4 different car classes to compare your racing lines against the very best in the world. UPGRADE YOUR CARS Unlock and upgrade a selection of classic Rush Rally cars. Use our simple upgrade system to tailor each car to your own specific driving style. OPTIMISED CONTROLS A control system designed to work with both touch screens and game controllers allows racing to become more fun and consistent however you choose to play. Including the ability to scale, move and swap buttons to suit your needs.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: DayCost Pro - Personal Finance
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺149,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺149,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Three seconds a bill. Fast, Security and Easy to use is our aim, and iOS notification center widget. Look at other people how to say: ◎ I just downloaded this app and I am so loving it already! It seems easy to use but I need to explore it more. ◎ Very innovative work. Keep up guys. 5 star app. ◎ It's quick to note down your expenses and helps you track your money. ◎ Polished, smart, simple, with all functions of apps of this kind. Exactly the one I was looking for. Makes me delete other similar apps on my phone and keep only this one, really. ◎ I love this app! It is clean, beautiful, very customizable, and user-friendly. I love the ability to make your own categories and accounts. And I also love the ability to put it in your pull-down Notification Center on your phone. It makes it quickly accessible during the day. Great job, love the app! Apple Watch: You can create incomes and expenses from your Apple Watch. The Glance shows your expenses of today, this month. Feature： ◎ Three seconds only: pull down, fill money, choose category ◎ iOS notification center widget: you can easily account when iPhone lock screen ◎ Passcode security: everyone cannot open, only you. even double-click the Home button, in the App list can not view the data ◎ Support more than 160 kinds of currency, conversion exchange rate automatic updates ◎ Calculator: built-in calculator, more convenient and faster ◎ Full gestures: fast billing basic ◎ Humane beginners guide: for special operations, we guide the way through the animation + text, more intuitive, easier to understand ◎ iCloud backup & restore ◎ Dropbox backup & restore ◎ Export data to CSV via Email ◎ Recurring event, both expenses and incomes, with rich frequency options. ◎ Allow custom theme color and wallpaper. ◎ Allow add transaction from template. Basic： ◎ Expense & Income bills can be added photos ◎ Income, Expense, Transfer, the others have ◎ Graphical reports, allowing you to easily view the balance of payments situation year / month / week ◎ Budget management: give yourself a reason to control consumption ◎ A variety of color themes and wallpaper, allows you to fully personalize ◎ Custom categories and consumption expenditure accounts, more in line with your needs ◎ Supports iPhone & iPad ◎ Daily reminder Increase： ◎ Easy copy history through gestures and automatically positioned in the day consumption date, you only need to modify the money can be. of course, you can use the existing money saved directly ◎ You can also add categories and account when billing editing, click on the banner to change currency If you give up because of difficulties If you give up because of busy If you want to know where expenses If you want to save money If 。。。 Try our "DayCost" it, she will be your best assistant URL Schemes: DayCost:// Help translate DayCost: Contribute to the DayCost translation in your language. Let's make DayCost available to everyone in the world! We will show translator's info in DayCost, if you so desire. In addition, we also give several redemption code as a gift. have any suggestions or comments, please write to us：support@daycost.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Road to Empress
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress II：₺490,00 → ₺449,00 [₺449,00 ~ ₺490,00]

All Price Information

Price：₺41,99

In-App Purchases

  • Road to Empress-Sammlung：₺699,00
  • total chapter：₺699,00
  • Road to Empress Collection：₺650,00
  • Road to Empress II：₺449,00
  • Road to Empress I：₺279,00
  • road to empress I -- cost：₺299,99
  • 648000 Cracked Egg：₺4.999,99
  • 128000 Cracked Egg：₺999,99

Application Description

This drama requires an internet connection. Road to Empress I contains 16 chapters; Road to Empress II contains 32 chapters. Both include free trial chapters. A palace adventure unlike anything you've played—shaped entirely by your choices! Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power. ● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally. Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory! ● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast! ● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story! Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne. ● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate! You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings. ● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips: Review Memorials: Work through memorials, balance noble houses, and shape the empire with one stroke of your brush. Issue Edicts: Weigh every decision and define the court's fate. Rule with an iron fist or a merciful hand, and build the empire you envision! ● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile! About New One Studio An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, our users championed The Invisible Guardian and earned us a BAFTA, proving great interactive storytelling can live in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage. Two works, different stories, one shared vision: let global users experience traditional Eastern culture. A bridge across cultures for every FMV fan. Road to Empress is a saga of the legendary empress. In Road to Empress I, follow a legendary beginning — an unknown girl navigating deadly palace power struggles with wisdom and courage. In Road to Empress II, return as a master strategist. Stakes are brutally higher. Pull the strings, keep ministers in check, and forge a golden age. Every word of your empire's legacy — written by you! (Official Orange Light Authorization, with sincere thanks to Orange Light for their music support.) YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/@RoadtoEmpressOfficial X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/ Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress
